engine.backendNote: LocalMaxxing currently rejects xpu/sycl/rpc backend values; submitted without backend and recorded SYCL/RPC details in notes and engineFlags.extraFlags.

comparison.qualityScope: Scheduling/kernel row-packing change only. Same UD-IQ4_XS weights, F16 KV cache, sampler path, split mode, and no GPU power-limit changes. A deterministic 16-token greedy generation smoke matched default row grouping byte-for-byte.

commandSnippet: GGML_SYCL_FAST_MUL_MAT_ID_IQ4_XS=1 GGML_SYCL_MMV_Y_RUNTIME=2 GGML_SYCL_DISABLE_DNN=1 GGML_DISABLE_FUSED_RMS_NORM=1 llama-bench -m MiniMax-M2.7-UD-IQ4_XS-00001-of-00004.gguf -rpc 127.0.0.1:50100|0,127.0.0.1:50101|0,127.0.0.1:50102|0,127.0.0.1:50103|0 -p 0 -n 64 -r 5 -ngl 99 -sm layer -ts 1/1/1/1 -fa 0 -nkvo 0 -ub 32 -ctk f16 -ctv f16 -t 4 -w 0 -mmp 1 -rtr 1 -fmoe 1 -no-mmad 0 -muge 1 -sas 0 -o json
notes: Runtime MMV row grouping for SYCL MMVQ/MiniMax IQ4_XS kernels. Values are constrained to 1, 2, 4, or 8. Runtime value 2 reproduced the compile-time MMV_Y=2 direction and was submitted as a small software-only improvement.
